title: All The Weird Things (ATWT)
description: Holy molyy moly, is there a lot of weird things in here, oh yes there is, and yeah i worked on this mod for about a week. It adds a whole lot of weird things... as thats what the title says...
body:
# All The Weird Things (ATWT)
Oh yes, isnt this weird? And No, not everything will be listed here, check the changlog or youtube video about version 1.0 or the newest version out.

## Nintendo Switchs
I added the Nintendo Switch 1 AND 2, cuz why not? And also a modding feature (which has no use for the Nintendo Switch 1 yet) also i wouldnt put a modchip in the Nintendo Switch 2, if we're you.. something... BIG.. could blow your socks off...

## My Friends
Yeah you heard me right, My Friends are in here! (Like they are in most of my mods) Webhead_109 and WobblyLife011 are in version 1.0 so far, more friends plan to come. Webhead_109 spawns in a Tagia, so go find him to get some Fresh Coke. WobblyLife011 on the other hand isnt himself today, he has turning into a ROBOT!!! Yes, a ROBOT!!! He drops the Eletronic Chip (so you dont eat the wrong chip), and is a KEY part into making the Nintendo Switchs

## Polished Gravel and Smooth Sand
Basically what this tpoic says right above me... but uh Polished Gravel has a armor set... aka the WORST armor set... but Smooth Sand is just blocks.... and its sibling Smmooth Sand.... a ore type with its armor and tools.

## Foods!!!
The last topic here (without talking about to much) Coke, Dirt Coke, Doritos, Chips, and more to come!

## Here are some mod(s) you should use with ATWT!
JEI (for the recipes): https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/versions?g=1.20.1&l=forge
